name: Rate of Change
description: Calculates the derivative (rate of change) of a tag per second
author: NISystem

units_per_second.description: Express rate per second (vs per sample)

code:
# Rate of Change Calculator
# Useful for: heating/cooling rates, pressure rise rates, flow acceleration

import time

input_tag = config.get('input_tag', 'Temperature_1')
per_second = config.get('units_per_second', True)

current = tags.get(input_tag, 0)
now = time.time()

# Initialize state
if 'last_value' not in state:
    state['last_value'] = current
    state['last_time'] = now
    rate = 0.0
else:
    delta_value = current - state['last_value']
    delta_time = now - state['last_time']
    
    if delta_time > 0 and per_second:
        rate = delta_value / delta_time
    else:
        rate = delta_value
    
    state['last_value'] = current
    state['last_time'] = now

publish(f'py.{input_tag}_Rate', rate)
